create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the repository was created

effective_labels.description: Resolved labels applied to the repository for categorization or metadata

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the repository in configurations

name.description: Name of the repository used for identification within Artifact Registry

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform for organizing and managing the repository

update_time.description: Timestamp indicating the last update made to the repository
